summary: Full backend + frontend testing for Guidance Angel landing & booking platform. Backend pytest (15 tests) all green; UI flows (header CTA, service-card preselect, multi-step live booking with calendar/slots, voice-note 3-step flow, mock-payment confirmation, admin login, admin dashboard with stats/bookings) all working end-to-end. Razorpay correctly in mock mode.

issues: Stats cards show '—' placeholders for ~1-2s while /api/admin/stats and /api/admin/bookings are fetching after login redirect. Not a bug, but a brief skeleton/spinner would feel more polished.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `await db.bookings.update_one` for failed signature in verify-payment runs before raising HTTPException(400) — that's correct, just noted. Logic is sound.
server.py uses deprecated `@app.on_event('startup' / 'shutdown')`. Works on FastAPI 0.110+ but consider migrating to `lifespan` context manager.
BookingDialog.jsx line 93-94: redundant ternary `initialService.is_voice_note ? 0 : 0`. Harmless dead branch, can be simplified to `setStep(0)`.
AdminDashboard.jsx: `data-testid` for revenue card is `stat-revenue-(₹)` (contains parens) — works but a sanitised key like `stat-revenue` would be safer for selectors.
Admin endpoints don't expose pagination/filtering (limit 500). Fine for MVP but flag for future scale.

RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET fallback to 'placeholder_secret' is correct, but logger isn't yet defined when seed_db runs (logger is declared at end of file). Currently logger is module-level after seed_db registration — works because startup runs after import completes, just stylistically out of order.
test_credentials: Admin jenika / guidance@2026 verified working from /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: Tests created 4 TEST_-prefixed bookings via real API + UI (3 paid via mock-payment flow, 1 pending). Visible in admin dashboard. Cleanup not done since this is fresh DB; main agent may purge if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend stable; mock-payment flow auto-confirms via /api/bookings/verify-payment. Voice-note services skip the schedule step (3-step). Live readings require booking_date+booking_slot (4-step). Sundays return is_open:false. Slot list runs 10:00 AM through 7:00 PM in 30-min steps (no 7:30 PM). DB now contains 4 TEST_ bookings — adjust assertions if testing against this same DB.
